title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Shinobu, Unknown person #6, Momonosuke, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji-Kun!? I thought you were chasing the prostitutes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Give the kid back!! and you better disappear again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shinobuchan!! Take care of momo please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You declaring YOUR NAME was amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let go of me you bird bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to die with a hole in my belly!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A hole huh, how about I split you in two then!! C'mon just disappear and escape

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sanji----!!! That was one hell of an attack!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
